summary: Partnership expansion adds fourth U.S. market as DoorDash pushes deeper into autonomous delivery

headline: Nas Raises $27M Series A Led by Khosla Ventures as AI Unleashes the Biggest Wave of New Business Creation in History
summary: Nas, the AI platform built for the solopreneur economy, today announced $27 million in Series A funding led by Vinod Khosla and Nicole Fraenkel at Khosla Ventures. Lightspeed Venture Partners and 500 Startups participated alongside strategic angels including Shuo Wang, co-founder of Deel, Stanley Tang, co-founder of DoorDash, Scott Adelson, CEO of Houlihan Lokey, and Tim Ferriss, author of The 4-Hour Workweek.

headline: Alphabet's Wing Drone Unit, DoorDash Expand Into Atlanta. Google Stock Turns Green In 2026.
summary: Google and DoorDash on Wednesday expanded drone deliveries into part of Atlanta, marking the fifth market of their partnership.

headline: Foot Locker partners with DoorDash for on-demand delivery
summary: The deal is among the latest between a retailer and the delivery platform, which says over a third of its active monthly users shop retail and grocery categories.

headline: New Gig Worker Tax Break May Reshape DoorDash Dasher Economics
summary: The U.S. has approved a tax break for gig workers, including DoorDash (NasdaqGS:DASH) delivery people. From 2025 to 2028, eligible workers can deduct up to US$25,000 of tip income from taxable income. Starting in 2026, gig platforms must separately report tip income on Form 1099-K to workers and the IRS. DoorDash runs a large food and local commerce delivery network that relies heavily on independent contractors for last mile fulfillment. The new U.S. tax rules directly affect those workers...
